name: Frictionless onboarding: hero, install, env-var quickstart, skill on landing
objective: Make the landing hero flow real end to end: fix the broken uv tool install knowledge-cli line (publish to PyPI or switch the copy to the working install form), make the depicted init/password step honest (show the prompt or generate a password), promote the env-var REST setup (KB_API_BASE_URL/KB_API_TOKEN) as the recommended agent path with blockers addressed, and publish the explain skill on the landing page — copyable and downloadable — with agent-first guidance.
